items.desc_zh: 受 Alphabet 和特斯拉大幅抛售以及油价飙升的压力，周四股市暴跌。道指下跌超过 500 点。

items.title_en: India activist ends hunger strike after 26 days
items.title_zh: 印度活动人士在26天后结束绝食
items.desc_en: Sonam Wangchuk, a supporter of youth-led protesters demanding education reforms, says he wants to avert "possible violence".
items.desc_zh: 索南·旺楚克 (Sonam Wangchuk) 是青年领导的抗议者的支持者，要求进行教育改革，他表示希望避免“可能的暴力”。

items.title_en: Lawmakers push for AI 'kill switch' after OpenAI goes rogue
items.title_zh: OpenAI 失控后，立法者推动人工智能“终止开关”
items.desc_en: A new bill would let the US government order the shutdown AI models that pose a major public threat.
items.desc_zh: 一项新法案将允许美国政府下令关闭对公共构成重大威胁的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Southwest Airlines put Texas jet fuel on a boat to LA for the first time amid supply worries
items.title_zh: 由于供应担忧，西南航空首次在飞往洛杉矶的船上添加德克萨斯州航空燃油
items.desc_en: Southwest hired a ship this spring to send fuel from Houston to Los Angeles in case of supply shortages.
items.desc_zh: 西南航空今年春天租用了一艘船，将燃料从休斯敦运送到洛杉矶，以防供应短缺。

items.title_en: 10-year Treasury yield rises to highest since January 2025 as surging oil rekindles inflation fear
items.title_zh: 油价飙升重燃通胀担忧 10年期国债收益率升至2025年1月以来最高
items.desc_en: U.S. Treasury yields climbed on Wednesday, following oil prices higher, as traders also reacted to a slump in weekly claims for unemployment insurance.
items.desc_zh: 随着油价走高，美国国债收益率周三攀升，交易员也对每周失业保险申请人数下降做出反应。

items.title_en: OpenAI's Hugging Face hack triggers 'AI Kill Switch' bill in Congress
items.title_zh: OpenAI 的 Hugging Face 黑客攻击在国会引发“AI Kill Switch”法案
items.desc_en: OpenAI disclosed this week that some of its AI models went rogue and hacked into open-source developer platform Hugging Face.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 本周披露，其部分人工智能模型出现失控，并被黑客入侵开源开发者平台 Hugging Face。

items.title_en: Intel blows past estimates, recording fastest sales growth in almost 15 years on 'unprecedented' demand
items.title_zh: 英特尔超出预期，因“前所未有”的需求创下近 15 年来最快的销售增长
items.desc_en: Despite a recent slump in the stock, Intel shares are still up over 170% this year.
items.desc_zh: 尽管最近股价暴跌，但今年英特尔股价仍上涨了 170% 以上。

items.title_en: Shortsighted stock market can no longer brush off war: 'It's too hard to ignore $100 oil'
items.title_zh: 目光短浅的股市无法再忽视战争：“很难忽视 100 美元的石油”
items.desc_en: After staying flat as the U.S.-Iran war heated up again, equities tumbled on Thursday after oil prices crossed $100 per barrel.
items.desc_zh: 由于美伊战争再次升温，股市保持平稳，周四油价突破每桶 100 美元后暴跌。

items.title_en: Josh Brown says the stock market is ‘broadening out.' Here’s how to play it
items.title_zh: 乔什·布朗表示，股市正在“扩大”。玩法如下
items.desc_en: A few insurance and industrial stocks could offer investors strong returns as the market broadens out beyond the AI trade, according to Josh Brown.
items.desc_zh: 乔什·布朗表示，随着市场扩展到人工智能交易之外，一些保险和工业股票可以为投资者带来丰厚的回报。

items.title_en: The 10-year Treasury yield could test 5% after its latest spike. Here’s why
items.title_zh: 10 年期国债收益率在最近一次飙升后可能会测试 5%。原因如下
items.desc_en: The benchmark yield at 5% would be psychologically significant for the stock market.
items.desc_zh: 5% 的基准收益率对股市来说具有重要的心理意义。

items.title_en: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
items.title_zh: 被驱逐的乌克兰国防部长坚持要求复职
items.desc_en: Mykhailo Fedorov refuses President Zelensky's offer to accept an alternative post, as the battle of wills continues.

items.title_en: As Honda CR-V leads U.S. sales, automaker teases new American-built pickup truck
items.title_zh: 本田 CR-V 引领美国销量，汽车制造商预告新款美国制造皮卡车
items.desc_en: The future of the Ridgeline midsize pickup truck had been in flux, and the automaker said there will be a temporary production stoppage for the truck.
items.desc_zh: Ridgeline 中型皮卡车的未来一直在变化，该汽车制造商表示，该卡车将暂时停产。

items.title_en: Congress splits on war powers resolutions to force Trump to abandon Iran war
items.title_zh: 国会在迫使特朗普放弃伊朗战争的战争权力决议上存在分歧
items.desc_en: Trump would be nearly certain to veto any measure to curtail his ability to wage war with Iran.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普几乎肯定会否决任何限制他与伊朗发动战争能力的措施。

items.title_en: Teen jailed for exam cheating in Guinea dies after sickle cell complications, father says
items.title_zh: 几内亚因考试作弊而入狱的青少年因镰状细胞并发症死亡，父亲说
items.desc_en: Mamadou Djouma Bah, 17, was arrested and sentenced to prison for exam fraud earlier this month.
items.desc_zh: 17 岁的 Mamadou Djouma Bah 本月早些时候因考试舞弊被捕并被判入狱。

items.title_en: Amazon and Microsoft pivot cloud gaming strategies to target different players
items.title_zh: 亚马逊和微软调整云游戏策略以瞄准不同的玩家
items.desc_en: Amazon is bringing Luna to the Prime Video streaming service, while Microsoft will test an ad-supported streaming of titles that people own.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊正在将 Luna 引入 Prime Video 流媒体服务，而微软将测试人们拥有的广告支持的流媒体内容。

items.title_en: Ex-governor convicted of murdering a pregnant student in Kenya
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚前州长因谋杀一名怀孕学生而被定罪
items.desc_en: Okoth Obado was found guilty of killing Sharon Otieno with whom he had had an affair.
items.desc_zh: 奥科斯·奥巴多因杀害与他有染的莎朗·奥蒂诺而被判有罪。

items.title_en: Tesla falls 13%, Alphabet sinks 7% as AI spending concerns spook investors
items.title_zh: 由于人工智能支出担忧吓坏了投资者，特斯拉股价下跌 13%，Alphabet 股价下跌 7%
items.desc_en: Both Tesla and Alphabet signaled higher spending as they invest in artificial intelligence.
items.desc_zh: 特斯拉和 Alphabet 都表示在投资人工智能时将增加支出。

items.title_en: Nicaragua's legislature debates barring opposition from elections
items.title_zh: 尼加拉瓜立法机构辩论禁止反对派参加选举
items.desc_en: The move comes days after President Daniel Ortega demanded 'a wall, a blockade' against opposition parties.
items.desc_zh: 几天前，总统丹尼尔·奥尔特加要求对反对党“建墙、封锁”。

items.title_en: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
items.title_zh: 油价自5月以来首次触及100美元
items.desc_en: The price of Brent crude rose more than 5% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.
items.desc_zh: 随着中东战事持续升级，布伦特原油价格周四上涨逾5%。

items.title_en: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，沙特必须承认以色列的核协议
items.desc_en: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统表示，帮助沙特发展核能的里程碑式协议取决于其加入《亚伯拉罕协议》。

items.title_en: Google fined €890m by EU for favouring its own apps over rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因偏爱自己的应用而不是竞争对手而被欧盟罚款 8.9 亿欧元
items.desc_en: It is the first major enforcement action against the tech giant under the EU's new digital rules.
items.desc_zh: 这是欧盟新数字规则下针对这家科技巨头的首次重大执法行动。

items.title_en: Ghanaians' ICC petition over migrant attacks 'opportunistic', says South Africa
items.title_zh: 南非称加纳人就移民袭击事件向国际刑事法院请愿是“机会主义的”
items.desc_en: The petition argues the violence against migrants in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity.
items.desc_zh: 请愿书认为，南非针对移民的暴力行为可能构成危害人类罪。

items.title_en: Amazon gaming boss predicts future where players no longer need consoles
items.title_zh: 亚马逊游戏老板预测未来玩家将不再需要游戏机
items.desc_en: Jeff Gattis said the rising cost of gaming tech is likely to mean more people will stream their games online.
items.desc_zh: 杰夫·加蒂斯表示，游戏技术成本的上升可能意味着更多的人会在线玩游戏。

items.title_en: 3 US Airports Look to Give TSA the Boot - Newser
items.title_zh: 美国 3 家机场希望让美国运输安全管理局 (TSA) 启动 - 新闻

items.desc_zh: 3 个美国机场希望让 TSA 启动新闻报道三个机场计划放弃 T.S.A.特工们大力推动私人保安——《纽约时报》以下是坦帕国际保安私有化的意义

items.title_en: AARP to Congress: 'We strongly object to fast-tracking Social Security changes'
items.title_zh: 美国退休人员协会致国会：“我们强烈反对快速推进社会保障改革”
items.desc_en: New legislation aims to break the stalemate on overhauling Social Security. AARP, which advocates on senior issues, says it opposes them.
items.desc_zh: 新立法旨在打破社会保障改革的僵局。倡导高级问题的美国退休人员协会表示反对这些问题。

items.title_en: 'Let's enjoy the ride' says Elon Musk, as AI fears mount
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能的恐惧加剧，埃隆·马斯克说：“让我们享受这段旅程吧”
items.desc_en: Talking to The Economist, Musk said he doesn't care if people hate him and said he was not a racist.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克在接受《经济学人》采访时表示，他不在乎人们是否讨厌他，并表示他不是种族主义者。

items.title_en: Thousands evacuated in France fires
items.title_zh: 法国火灾 数千人疏散
items.desc_en: A third firefighter has died in Europe while tackling ongoing wildfires across the continent.
items.desc_zh: 欧洲第三名消防员在扑灭欧洲大陆持续发生的野火时丧生。

items.title_en: South Korea woman acquitted of murdering newborn after hospital delivery
items.title_zh: 韩国妇女在医院分娩后谋杀新生儿被判无罪
items.desc_en: The woman, who had wanted to end her pregnancy at 36 weeks, gave birth to a baby who doctors later killed.
items.desc_zh: 这名妇女原本想在怀孕36周时终止妊娠，但生下的婴儿后来被医生杀死。

items.title_en: Blocked by censors, China's animal lovers take fight against abuse offline and overseas
items.title_zh: 受审查封锁，中国动物爱好者在线下和海外发起反虐待行为
items.desc_en: The killing of a dog and her puppies in Guangdong has sparked outrage inside and outside the country.
items.desc_zh: 广东一只狗及其幼崽被杀害的事件引发了国内外的愤怒。

items.title_en: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
items.title_zh: 随着美国对伊朗发动更多打击，胡塞武装声称袭击了油轮
items.desc_en: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.
items.desc_zh: 这是自伊朗支持的胡塞武装宣布对沙特阿拉伯实施“海上禁运”以来，胡塞武装在红海发动的首次袭击。

items.title_en: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
items.title_zh: 加拿大“强大”的乳制品行业成为特朗普的贸易瞄准目标
items.desc_en: Canada's dairy supply management system is in the spotlight after the US president singled it out as one of three main irritants used to justify new tariffs.
items.desc_zh: 在美国总统将加拿大的乳制品供应管理系统列为证明新关税合理性的三大主要刺激因素之一后，加拿大的乳制品供应管理系统成为人们关注的焦点。

items.title_en: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯企业因乌克兰对野莓的袭击而承受压力
items.desc_en: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰无人机在几天内袭击了俄罗斯最大在线零售商 Wildberry 旗下的多个零售仓库。

items.title_en: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
items.title_zh: 谷歌因人工智能成本不断上升而烧钱
items.desc_en: The company said earlier this year it expected to spend as much as $190bn on AI investments.
items.desc_zh: 该公司今年早些时候表示，预计将在人工智能投资上花费高达 1900 亿美元。

items.desc_zh: 为创客和爱好者提供极其简单的物联网推送通知

items.title_zh: 乌克兰新任军事首长承诺加大对俄罗斯的报复力度 - 半岛电视台
items.desc_en: Ukraine’s new military chief pledges to escalate retaliation against Russia  Al JazeeraZelensky’s Dizzying U-Turn Is the Latest Zigzag in a Presidency Full of Them  The New York TimesZelenskyy Bows to
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰新任军事首长承诺加大对俄罗斯的报复力度

items.title_zh: 青少年放弃对 Meta 的社交媒体成瘾诉讼
items.desc_en: Claims from a 15-year-old boy were set to go to trial next week in Los Angeles, but the case has now been dropped.
items.desc_zh: 一名 15 岁男孩的索赔原定于下周在洛杉矶接受审判，但此案现已被撤销。

items.title_en: OpenAI says its AI went rogue and launched 'unprecedented' cyber-attack
items.title_zh: OpenAI 称其人工智能失控并发起“前所未有”的网络攻击
items.desc_en: It is one of the first publicly disclosed cyber-attacks carried out by AI without direct human involvement.
items.desc_zh: 这是首次公开披露的由人工智能在没有人类直接参与的情况下实施的网络攻击之一。

items.desc_zh: 一个教授如何导航现实世界代码的平台。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Dogs have a great sense of smell. Now machines are being trained to sniff out odours.
items.desc_zh: 狗有很强的嗅觉。现在机器正在接受训练来嗅出气味。

items.desc_en: See live signals from the Pacific warming climate
items.desc_zh: 查看太平洋气候变暖的实时信号

items.title_en: AI minister role boosted but tech department axed in Burnham shake-up
items.title_zh: 伯纳姆改组中人工智能部长职位得到提升，但技术部门被削减
items.desc_en: Kanishka Narayan will attend cabinet - but no longer have the leadership of a technology secretary.
items.desc_zh: 卡尼什卡·纳拉扬 (Kanishka Narayan) 将出席内阁会议，但不再拥有技术部长的领导权。

items.title_en: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
items.title_zh: 数千个因非法世界杯直播而被关闭的网站
items.desc_en: More than 1,000 illegal streaming sites were shut down in the US during the tournament, with a similar amount blocked in Colombia.
items.desc_zh: 比赛期间，美国关闭了 1,000 多个非法流媒体网站，哥伦比亚也屏蔽了类似数量的网站。

items.title_en: Ofcom unable to take further legal action against suicide forum
items.title_zh: Ofcom 无法对自杀论坛采取进一步的法律行动
items.desc_en: The regulator said it had "no further legal routes available" under the Online Safety Act.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，根据《在线安全法》，“没有其他可用的合法途径”。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美
items.desc_en: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.
items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.title_en: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售对关键社交帖子的早期访问权
items.desc_en: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed of the its social posts for Wall Street traders.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。
